Design System
🎨Design System

Phase 1 Milestones

Home / Phase 1 Milestones

4-month build — B2B Waste Operating System for Turkey

Start Week 1
Duration 16 weeks (+2 buffer)
Team Solo lead (Ozan) + AI agents
Deploy target AWS eu-central-1 (Frankfurt)
Compliance target KVKK + EU CSRD/ESPR-ready

M0 — Environment & Infrastructure

📋 Planned
Weeks 1–3
🎯

Goal: Every AWS service is provisioned, networked, and reachable before a single line of business logic is written.

  • ☐ AWS Organizations + SSO, IAM roles (dev/prod)
  • ☐ VPC with public/private subnets, NAT Gateway, VPC Endpoints
  • ☐ RDS PostgreSQL Multi-AZ (db.t4g.medium)
  • ☐ ElastiCache Redis (cache.t4g.micro)
  • ☐ Cognito User Pool + App Client + Pre-Token-Generation Lambda
  • ☐ ECS Fargate cluster + ECR repositories
  • ☐ S3 buckets: audit-archive (WORM), documents, static-assets
  • ☐ GitHub Actions → ECR → ECS deploy pipeline
  • ☐ CloudWatch + CloudTrail
  • ☐ Sentry EU + PostHog EU provisioned
Deliverables: Terraform/CDK stack, architecture diagram, runbook

M1 — Auth, Data & RLS Substrate

⏳ In progress (POC done)
Weeks 4–6
🎯

Goal: User logs in via Cognito, JWT issued, every Postgres query transparently scoped to org via RLS.

  • ☑ Drizzle schema v1 — 7 tables, 4 enums, 16 indexes
  • ☑ RLS policies — 21 policies across all 7 tables
  • ☑ auth.* helper functions — uid(), org_id(), has_role(), is_member(), email(), user_org_ids()
  • ☐ JWT-via-GUC middleware (in Hono API, M2)
  • ☐ Cognito User Pool + Pre-Token-Generation Lambda
  • ☐ Org switching flow (new JWT, never client-claimed)
  • ☑ idempotency_keys table + schema
  • ☐ anchor_log table for daily Merkle root records
  • ☑ Audit hash chain trigger — SHA-256, BEFORE INSERT
  • ☐ DB backup + PITR (RDS config, Phase 1 deploy)
Deliverables: RLS isolation test suite ✅, auth flow integration test, seed data ✅

M2 — Core API & Business Logic

⏳ Next up
Weeks 7–10
🎯

Goal: All CRUD for tenders and bids live behind Hono API. Idempotency on every mutation. EventBridge events on every state change. Full local deployable demo.

  • ☐ Hono API scaffold (apps/api/) with route groups
  • ☐ JWT-via-GUC middleware (dev HMAC, Cognito-ready)
  • ☐ Idempotency middleware on all mutation endpoints
  • ☐ POST / GET / PATCH /tenders (RLS-enforced)
  • ☐ POST /tenders/:id/bids + soft-close trigger
  • ☐ GET /audit (org-scoped, hash-chain verified)
  • ☐ Zod validation on all request bodies
  • ☐ EventBridge PutEvents publish from route handlers
  • ☐ docker-compose.yml api service + healthcheck
  • ☐ OpenAPI/Swagger auto-generated via @hono/zod-openapi
Deliverables: Deployable local bidding API, integration test, EventBridge trace

M3 — Real-time Push + Background Workers

📋 Planned
Weeks 11–13
🎯

Goal: Live UI via AppSync subscriptions. Background work on SQS workers. Auction close Lambda deployed. S3 audit mirror + Arbitrum anchor running daily.

  • ☐ Outbox table + DB trigger (CDC → AppSync publish)
  • ☐ AppSync GraphQL schema + onBidPlaced, onTenderUpdated subscriptions
  • ☐ SQS → Lambda workers (email notifications, webhook dispatches)
  • ☐ Auction close Lambda deployment (production IAM + monitoring)
  • ☐ S3 audit mirror daily export (JSON-Lines + Object Lock)
  • ☐ Arbitrum One anchor Lambda (daily Merkle root → Anchor contract)
Deliverables: End-to-end real-time test (bid → AppSync push → UI), EventBridge trace, anchored hash proof

M4 — Escrow, Providers & ESG

📋 Planned
Weeks 14–16
🎯

Goal: Step Functions escrow machine with provider-agnostic interface. e-fatura on settlement. ESG certs on-chain.

  • ☐ Provider-agnostic escrow interface (EscrowProvider abstract class)
  • ☐ ManualProvider (DB-simulated for dev)
  • ☐ IyzicoProvider (Marketplace API + sub-merchant)
  • ☐ Step Functions escrow state machine
  • ☐ Escrow webhook handler (idempotent)
  • ☐ material_recovery_certificate generation
  • ☐ ESG certificate in daily Merkle root
  • ☐ Nilvera/Foriba e-fatura integration
  • ☐ IBAN hashing at rest (PII, KVKK)
  • ☐ KVKK aydınlatma metni flow
Deliverables: Escrow state machine diagram, provider adapter test, ESG verification demo

M5 — Frontend & Launch

📋 Planned
Weeks 17–18
🎯

Goal: Next.js app deployed. Monitoring live. Compliance package complete.

  • ☐ Next.js App Router (TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Tailwind)
  • ☐ Auth pages (login, register, org selection, Cognito)
  • ☐ Dashboard (tender list, live bid feed, audit tail)
  • ☐ Tender detail page (bid form, countdown, history)
  • ☐ Admin pages
  • ☐ PostHog EU + Sentry EU
  • ☐ CloudWatch dashboard
  • ☐ KVKK compliance package (SCC, VERBİS, breach notification)
  • ☐ Load test (k6/Artillery)
  • ☐ Production runbook
Deliverables: Deployed Next.js app, monitoring dashboard, KVKK compliance folder

Timeline

M0 · W1–3
M1 · W4–6
M2 · W7–10
M3 · W11–13
M4 · W14–16
M5 · W17–18
Week 1 4 7 11 14 17 18
M0 Environment & Infrastructure W1–3
M1 Auth, Data & RLS W4–6
M2 Core API & Business Logic W7–10
M3 Real-time, Events & Scheduling W11–13
M4 Escrow, Providers & ESG W14–16
M5 Frontend & Launch W17–18

Risk Register

Risk Impact Mitigation
Iyzico sandbox unavailable / slow approval Blocks M4 escrow testing ManualProvider works independently; PayTR fallback
Cognito Lambda cold starts > 200ms Auth latency for every request Provisioned concurrency for Pre-Token Lambda
AppSync latency in eu-central-1 Real-time feels sluggish Measure; fall back to API Gateway WebSocket if >500ms p95
Solo throughput ceiling 4 months is tight AI agents parallelize; scope-cut AI/KPS to Phase 2
KVKK registration delays Cannot launch without VERBİS Start registration Week 1
Arbitrum testnet→mainnet migration Contract address changes Config-driven; trivial redeploy
